programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan gets a new uniform and is proud to wear it - until he sits on a freshly painted chair. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Matron is forced to change her plans after a tragic turn of events and decides to withdraw her resignation. Nurse Taylor grows closer to Jeff as they tackle an unusual medical emergency, but later finds herself confronted by an angry Frankie. Harper's money-saving schemes backfire in spectacular fashion, while an argument over a patient's health sparks off a chain of events which leaves Gordon's life hanging in the balance. Medical drama starring Wendy Craig, Amy Robbins, Robert Daws and Zoie Kennedy(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The season of goodwill descends on the Larkin household, and the family celebrates the 'perfick' Christmas. Drama, based on the characters created by HE Bates, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Ma Larkin wins a holiday weekend in Paris and Pop decides to make the trip special by treating it as a second honeymoon. Heart-warming drama, starring David Jason and Pam Ferris(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton faces a race against time to stop a saboteur when Aidensfield hosts a prestigious car hill-climb. Meanwhile, Bernie finds an old car in a cowshed and decides to renovate it, giving Vernon his chance to scoop the winnings in the event. Rural police drama, starring Duncan Bell, Peter Benson and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A seemingly straightforward burglary investigation takes an unexpected turn when the victim is found to be leading a double life and suspicions are raised that the break-in could have been part of an insurance fraud. Blaketon falls for the charms of a solicitor and teams up with Ventress to help her track down the beneficiaries of an unusual bequest. Rural police drama, starring Derek Fowlds(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A walk in the woods leads to tragedy for Emily Simpson, who witnesses something unsettling before being found dead in her cottage by old friend Lucy Bellringer. Convinced natural causes are not to blame, Lucy calls in DCI Barnaby and Sergeant Troy, whose investigation eventually uncovers sinister long-buried secrets. The first ever episode of the long-running detective drama, guest starring Jessica Hynes and Emily Mortimer(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Community spirit in the village of Morton Fendle is dealt a blow by the collapse of a craft centre in which many locals had invested - and Alan Hollingsworth, the businessman behind the project, has become a public hate figure. Barnaby investigates when Hollingsworth's wife disappears, and seems to have been kidnapped. However, when Hollingsworth is subsequently murdered and his wife reappears safe and sound, he suspects an elaborate scheme. Roger Allam guest stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The death of an unpopular art dealer leaves Poirot with a long list of suspects within his tangled, squabbling family - even though his eccentric wife had predicted his end. Detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Emma Fielding, Fiona Walker and Jeremy Northam(n)

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong's Land of the Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The television presenter and comedian takes on an epic 8,000-mile journey halfway around the Arctic Circle deep in mid-winter, a spectacular but deadly time of year to see the unforgiving, ice-bound region. His odyssey is full of surprises as he witnesses natural wonders and discovers the magnetic lure of the far north. The first edition sees Alexander begin in Scandinavia and head toward Iceland, as he swims with locals in the ocean, faces the worst storm in 25 years, and goes down the world's first major tunnel to be built into the heart of a glacier(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien splashes out on a trip to the Canary Islands, but with Tracey's fear of flying, Sharon's hopes for adventure and the novelist's own eagerness for anything in trousers, will it be plain sailing? Linda Robson, Pauline Quirke and Lesley Joseph star in this 2014 Christmas special(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon amazes the others with her high IQ, and Dorien, under pressure to find a heroine for her next book, decides to push her toward a surprising new career. Meanwhile, Garth (played by Samuel James, replacing Matt Willis) is feeling despondent following his split from Australian Marcie, and he's proving a handful for mum Tracey. Linda Robson, Pauline Quirke and Lesley Joseph star in the hit sitcom(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Called to the home of an elderly couple who haven't been seen for a while, Janet discovers Eunice Bevan's severed head at the bottom of the stairs, her body at the top, and her husband Joe in bed, emaciated and barely able to speak. Meanwhile, the detective puts her house on the market, admitting her relationship with Ade is over, and three months in to Rachel's marriage to traffic cop Sean, she's starting to feel a little claustrophobic. George Costigan and Nicola Walker guest star, with Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: In a retrospective episode set immediately after the events of series two, Rachel faces further accusations of masterminding the fatal attack on ex-lover Nick and finds comfort in the arms of ever-faithful Sean, agreeing to marry him. Amid the wedding celebrations, Janet and Ade admit defeat and decide to split up for good, while Gill is duty bound to take action when she catches Pete in a compromising position. The detectives also investigate the case of a businessman suspected of murdering a homeless man(n)

programme.title: The Mafia with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part two of two. In Philadelphia, the broadcaster explores one of the bloodiest periods in the American Mafia's long history, as he sits down with former crime boss Ralph Natale. In a revealing interview, the ex-godfather spells out just how ruthless he had to be to control the men under him. In New Jersey, Trevor seeks out one-time cop Ron Previte, who led a double life as a high-ranking gangster and paid FBI informant, earning over $1million for his role in convicting more than 50 members of the Philadelphia Mob and their associates(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A woman's body is pulled from the river, reminding Frost that he investigated the death of her husband's first wife years ago. Unfortunately, it turns out that a key witness's statement went astray during the earlier case - which leads to Frost being suspended from duty. Discreetly continuing his enquiries, he is intrigued to learn the local priest recently heard a very disturbing confession. Starring David Jason, Eoin McCarthy, Anthony Calf, Kenneth Cope and Isla Blair(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan indulges a whim and lifts Doreen off the ground, but strains his back in the process. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack asks Arthur's sister out to the Boxing Day social - much to her brother's displeasure. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Joe is surprised that Sally has not told Kevin what happened. Reg, Curly, Deirdre, Alf and Emily attend Brendan's funeral. Raquel is accepted onto the modelling course(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally is desperate not to be alone with Joe. Raquel doesn't want to face Bet and tell her she's leaving. Vicky is pleased to see Steve. Debi feels trapped by the shop(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy takes a mystery phone call and Chris is suspicious. Neil takes Kim to look at some stables that are for sale. Chris demands that a drunken Frank hands over his car keys(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Michael prepares for his trial to begin. Worry gets the better of Elizabeth and she refuses to eat. Archie is confused by Zoe's behaviour(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A magistrate does his best to protect a young troublemaker - until an embarrassing connection between the two comes to light. The village mourns the death of Dr Summerbee, who is temporarily replaced by James Alway, while Vernon wonders if he may regret an offer to help old flame Maggie Byrne. Rural police drama, starring Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A nostalgic Stan remembers his first day at the depot, when he was a conductor and Blakey was a driver. He also recounts the events leading to Arthur and Olive's engagement. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Stephen Lewis and Michael Robbins(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Blakey cuts the canteen's opening hours, but when he sacks one of the staff, things really turn nasty. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby lets a room to a young couple he believes have just got married - unaware that they are not man and wife. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Kevin and Mim meet Maggie for the first time. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: The team turns out for another Saturday game. Comedy, starring Josie Lawrence, Timothy Spall, Robert Daws and Brenda Blethyn(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy falls in love with the victim of a handbag snatch, and the unlikely pair become the talk of the village as they go out on a series of dates. Merton attempts to track down porcelain figures stolen during a crime spree in nearby Whitby - and is given a new lead when a similar theft occurs at Mr Osbourne's house(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: The final day of Michael's trial arrives and Elizabeth is not optimistic about his chances. Lorraine deliberately misses her social worker appointment(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carol lets slip to Frank that Joe met up with Kim in the Woolpack, Michael spends his first night in prison, and Kim has some shocking news for Neil(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is upset that Angie did not tell him she was leaving, Reg confides in him that he intends to buy the shop at a bargain price, and the Baldwins return from Florida(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera plans a party for Tommy's first birthday, Amy is flattered that Andy wants to be with her but fears he will regret the decision, and Alf throws a retirement do(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits a new age commune, where a man has fallen to his death, or may have been pushed. The dead man turns out to have a connection to the leader's shady past - they set the commune up together as a confidence trick, but the leader came to believe in what he preaches. A further death raises greater suspicion, especially since a vast inheritance might be coming the group's way. Guest starring Stephen Moyer (True Blood)(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy falls in love with the victim of a handbag snatch, and the unlikely pair become the talk of the village as they go out on a series of dates. Merton attempts to track down porcelain figures stolen during a crime spree in nearby Whitby - and is given a new lead when a similar theft occurs at Mr Osbourne's house(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth helps an old friend find refuge at country house Greenshaw's Folly, but a sinister shadow falls over the strange building's various inhabitants and a murderer strikes. Miss Marple uncovers secrets from the past about Miss Greenshaw as a dangerous storm gathers and the bodies start to pile up. Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted)(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy man whose double life left him vulnerable to exploitation. Away from work, Rachel's recent moment of indiscretion threatens to come back to haunt her when a confused Sean takes a phone call from her one-night stand, and after Ade is pushed into living with his girlfriend on a permanent basis, Janet asks her mother to move in(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Troubled saleswoman Helen (Nicola Walker), whose mother was murdered back in episode one, turns up on Janet's doorstep with information that takes the investigation in a completely different direction - paving the way for the formidable Det Supt Julie Dodson to be called in. Meanwhile, new recruit Sgt Rob Waddington arrives on the scene - putting Janet's nose out of joint as she is demoted back down to constable. Emmerdale star Danny Miller (Aaron Livesy) joins the cast(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's busy love life makes him late for work again. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the depot to claim her lost property, but Stan and Jack have already eaten it. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Roger returns to Liverpool, while Pop discovers Edith's new boyfriend George is a con-artist defrauding the ministry - and resolves to teach him a lesson. David Jason stars(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. A seat becomes vacant on the local council when Sam Popham is taken ill, so Pop stands in the election, and Mariette returns from holiday with Charley. David Jason stars(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Pop and Ma become the target of dirty tricks and smear tactics during the election campaign, and Charley is placed in a compromising position by Abigail's teacher(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper sleuth returns to his home country of Belgium for the first time since the First World War to attend a medal ceremony, only to find a murder case needs solving. Agatha Christie mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Chancellor and David De Keyser(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of the sleepy hamlet of Little Worthy is disturbed when a man's body is found tied down in a miniature village - just like the hero in classic tale Gulliver's Travels. As the investigation begins, Barnaby has no shortage of suspects, including the victim's recently jilted partner - a teacher whose classroom is full of paintings of the story - his teenage lover, a caretaker and a hotel owner. But the case takes a twist when the killer strikes again amid the chaos of the annual fancy-dress boat race. Detective drama, guest starring Jesse Birdsall and Olivia Colman, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A burglar dubbed 'The Creeper' targets the villages of Midsomer as Barnaby and Jones investigate the murder of a guest at an upper-crust dinner party. As the case progresses, Barnaby becomes the thief's latest victim and it emerges that several high-society friends with connections to gangsters and a police chief have a few secrets worth killing for. Detective drama, starring John Nettles and Jason Hughes, with guest appearances from Rik Mayall and Jenny Agutter(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Connie Bishop keeps waking in the night, convinced she has an intruder, but most of the villagers in Badger's Drift dismiss her fears as an overactive imagination. Days later, a local councillor thought to have been obsessed with her is found murdered in her garden, and the ensuing investigation by Barnaby and Jones uncovers jealous rivals, ruthless social climbers and a cottage with a few secrets. Guest starring Paul Kaye, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When a man's charred remains are found after an explosion, Foyle's investigations lead him to a top secret intelligence organisation. With murder and deception rife among its members, the race is on to find out the truth, but the detective's discoveries threaten his future career. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen with guests Angela Thorne, Ronald Pickup and Samuel West(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute leads to murder after a stalwart in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe as Barnaby and Jones investigate. Guest starring Hugo Speer (Bleak House), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Oxford plays host to a veteran film star, in town to visit a local cinema. However, a mysterious death casts a sinister pall over the occasion, and offers the newly promoted DS Endeavour Morse a fresh case to pursue. Meanwhile, a family visit puts DCI Thursday's hospitality to the test. Inspector Morse prequel, starring Shaun Evans and Roger Allam(n)

programme.desc: Rigsby lets a room to a young couple he believes have just got married - unaware that they are not man and wife. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Kevin and Mim meet Maggie for the first time. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn(n)

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: The team turns out for another Saturday game. Comedy, starring Josie Lawrence, Timothy Spall, Robert Daws and Brenda Blethyn(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy falls in love with the victim of a handbag snatch, and the unlikely pair become the talk of the village as they go out on a series of dates. Merton attempts to track down porcelain figures stolen during a crime spree in nearby Whitby - and is given a new lead when a similar theft occurs at Mr Osbourne's house(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: The final day of Michael's trial arrives and Elizabeth is not optimistic about his chances. Lorraine deliberately misses her social worker appointment(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Carol lets slip to Frank that Joe met up with Kim in the Woolpack, Michael spends his first night in prison, and Kim has some shocking news for Neil(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is upset that Angie did not tell him she was leaving, Reg confides in him that he intends to buy the shop at a bargain price, and the Baldwins return from Florida(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera plans a party for Tommy's first birthday, Amy is flattered that Andy wants to be with her but fears he will regret the decision, and Alf throws a retirement do(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits a new age commune, where a man has fallen to his death, or may have been pushed. The dead man turns out to have a connection to the leader's shady past - they set the commune up together as a confidence trick, but the leader came to believe in what he preaches. A further death raises greater suspicion, especially since a vast inheritance might be coming the group's way. Guest starring Stephen Moyer (True Blood)(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy falls in love with the victim of a handbag snatch, and the unlikely pair become the talk of the village as they go out on a series of dates. Merton attempts to track down porcelain figures stolen during a crime spree in nearby Whitby - and is given a new lead when a similar theft occurs at Mr Osbourne's house(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth helps an old friend find refuge at country house Greenshaw's Folly, but a sinister shadow falls over the strange building's various inhabitants and a murderer strikes. Miss Marple uncovers secrets from the past about Miss Greenshaw as a dangerous storm gathers and the bodies start to pile up. Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted)(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy man whose double life left him vulnerable to exploitation. Away from work, Rachel's recent moment of indiscretion threatens to come back to haunt her when a confused Sean takes a phone call from her one-night stand, and after Ade is pushed into living with his girlfriend on a permanent basis, Janet asks her mother to move in(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting - but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary. Classic adventure, guest starring TP McKenna and Terence Rigby(n)

programme.desc: Theo helps his old partner in Las Vegas, who has arrested an elderly counterfeiter, only for the crook to be murdered in custody. Guest starring Eileen Brennan (Private Benjamin)(n)

programme.desc: A psychic housewife is enlisted to help Quincy track down a crazed sex-attacker and the murderer of several young women, putting her own life in danger(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry tries to help his friend Kate evict some unwanted tenants, but comes to doubt her motives. Meanwhile, Arthur is desperate to get into the property market and tries to sell Terry's flat without telling him. Guest starring Toyah Willcox and Simon Cadell(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad trails diamond thief Jimmy Fleet on the inside, with Carter acting undercover as a fellow prisoner aiming to gain his confidence. On his release for lack of evidence, Fleet seeks Carter's assistance after discovering his girlfriend has vanished with the jewels, suspecting she has been abducted. Michael Elphick guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a foreign student, an apparent cocaine trafficker, is shot dead, Cowley tasks Bodie and Doyle with targetting teenage traffickers who have diplomatic ties with South America. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins, Gordon Jackson and Alice Krige(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is suspected of involvement in a series of jewel robberies on the French Riviera, and has to stay one step ahead of the police long enough to catch the real culprit. Guest starring Ronnie Barker and Aimee Delamain(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: On Christmas eve, Theo helps a woman who claims her boyfriend is plotting to commit a crime - but does not know what it is. Guest starring Veronica Hamel (Hill Street Blues)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Part two of two. The coroner's marriage plans are put on hold while he continues the investigation into the case of a woman who claims to have killed her husband(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry takes a job driving a Mercedes, but it gets stolen while his back is turned, and to make matters worse he is accused of stealing a cache of diamonds concealed in the car. Vintage comedy, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A notorious hard-nosed villain offers to co-operate with the police and gives himself up in return for protection for his wife and their children, so Bodie and Doyle are assigned to perform the task. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: Scotland v Samoa. Jill Douglas presents action from both teams' second Pool A encounter, held at Kobe Misaki Stadium in Japan. With commentary from Miles Harrison, Scott Hastings and Ugo Monye(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Vintage restorers Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove challenge themselves to make money out of buying and selling other people's unwanted automotive junk and classic collectibles. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler is racked with guilt for kissing Joey's girlfriend and embarks on a wild spending spree in a misguided effort to keep his pal from discovering the truth. Meanwhile, Phoebe proves to be the only one who appreciates Ross's dubious keyboard talents(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Camping
programme.desc: Michelle Collins, Joe Swash, Bobby Davro and Stephen Bailey experience Britain's camping culture to learn about life under canvas. Laden with backpacks, they begin with breakfast in a hotel overlooking Poole Harbour in Dorset. Then, they pick up some tips on making shelters and starting fires from a bushcraft instructor. Later, with fifth member Cheryl Baker on board, the gang members finally set up camp. All they need to do is work out how to put the tents up and sort out the toilet situation. With germophobes, arachnophobes and very few practical skills present, what could go wrong?(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Camping
programme.desc: The campers continue their stay in Dorset, a landscape that inspired Thomas Hardy and Jane Austen. Stephen Bailey's cooking skills are put to the test in the site's small kitchen, while Cheryl Baker and Michelle Collins attempt to put up a six-person pop-up tent. The group also finds time to relax with a trip to the region's Jurassic Coast, before the men experience a fishing trip in Weymouth, and Bobby Davro tries kayaking for the first time(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Camping
programme.desc: Joe Swash unfortunately has to leave the group, and with Bobby Davro falling ill and Stephen Bailey securing a coveted soap role, Michelle Collins and Cheryl Baker are left to fend for themselves in a tent on a cliff side. However, support is soon at hand in the shape of former Blue Peter presenter Tim Vincent, who turns up to help out. Tim settles into a hammock for the night, but is spooked by the noisy forest at night. He later discovers the girls have bailed and are staying in a nearby cottage. Figuring that if you cannot beat them, join them, Tim abandons his hammock and heads inside(n)

programme.title: Celebrity 5 Go Camping
programme.desc: The campers near the end of their adventure on the Isle of Wight. The last time the group saw Bobby Davro, he was in a cardboard tent in the Botanic Gardens, but now seems to have vanished. Meanwhile, Stephen Bailey heads out for a walk and Tim Vincent decides to sample the local beers after he spots some hops in the Gardens. Michelle Collins seeks to create a pescatarian dish for the evening menu, while Cheryl Baker decides to brew up a beef stew. Stephen and Michelle head to the harbour to get some very fresh ingredients when they receive a message from the errant Bobby(n)

programme.title: Coca-Cola vs Pepsi: Cola Wars
programme.desc: Documentary about the ongoing battle between world-famous brands Pepsi and Coca-Cola to prove which one of them is top of the pops. The film looks at the secrets of each drink's success and also reveals the strategies and secrets behind the fierce contest between the long-time rivals, interrogating their canny marketing ploys and aggressive promotional techniques in their battle to win the never-ending cola war(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes guide to the Mr Kipling Factory in Carlton, South Yorkshire, which first opened in the 1970s and was the largest bakery in Europe at the time. Members of the workforce provide an insight into the cutting edge technology that keeps the cakes coming 24 hours a day, while food historian Polly Russell presents a guide to the company's history, revealing how recipes that date back to the 1800s remain popular favourites to this day(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ship

programme.title: Inside

Meanwhile, in Beverly Hills, Freedom Jacob Cesar is revamping his $10 million pad, decking it out in designer gear in the hope of making a huge profit(n)

programme.title: The Best of Bad TV
programme.desc: The unbelievable excesses of 1980s television, including the blissfully ignorant sexism of Miss World, baffling game shows for dogs, the inappropriateness of Minipops and the shape-shifting of Manimal. First-hand contributors, perpetrators and victims, as well as the simply gobsmacked, look back as they recall the joy and the horror of it all(n)

programme.title: The Hunting
programme.desc: Teacher Ray Allum inadvertently discovers a naked image of teenager Amandip on her boyfriend Nassim's confiscated phone. He resolves to protect his students' privacy, but soon finds that the decision has been taken out of his hands. Drama, starring Asher Keddie, Richard Roxburgh and Sam Reid(n)

programme.title: Murder on the Internet
programme.desc: Crimes involving dating apps have risen sevenfold in the past two years with more than 400 offences reported to police last year - including assault, rape, child sex grooming and even murder. This two-part documentary looks at some of the most shocking crimes committed by people using online dating as a way of finding their victims, revealing why greater public awareness of the risks of using such apps is needed(n)

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther (1975)
programme.desc: The inept Inspector Clouseau sets out to unmask a notorious international jewel thief believed to be behind the theft of a priceless diamond - but anarchy, as ever, follows wherever he goes. programme.title: Little Man Tate (1991)

A psychologist intervenes, only to discover her involvement causes more problems than it solves. Drama, directed by and starring Jodie Foster, with Dianne Wiest, Adam Hann-Byrd and Harry Connick Jr(n)

programme.title: The Borrowers (1997)
programme.desc: A family of four-inch-high people living beneath the floorboards of an ordinary human home help the owner's son fight back when a dastardly lawyer plans to demolish the house and make way for a luxury apartment block. Children's fantasy, starring John Goodman, Jim Broadbent, Celia Imrie, Flora Newbigin and Tom Felton(n)

programme.title: Teen Wolf (1985)
programme.desc: A teenage misfit is initially dismayed to learn he is a werewolf as a result of a hereditary curse. He finds there are advantages as he becomes a local celebrity, while his enhanced agility makes him the star player of his school's basketball team - but fame quickly goes to his head. Comedy, starring Michael J Fox, James Hampton and Susan Ursitti(n)

programme.title: Fantastic Four (2015)
programme.desc: A gifted young scientist joins a secret project researching inter-dimensional travel, and they return from a journey to another world having been granted superhuman powers. Their abilities make them the only hope for Earth's survival when a colleague who was lost on their expedition returns to wreak vengeance. Superhero adventure, starring Miles Teller, Michael B Jordan, Kate Mara and Jamie Bell(n)

programme.title: Hell or High Water (2016)
programme.desc: A divorced father and his ex-con older brother embark on a quiet crime spree as they resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family ranch in West Texas. Drama, starring Jeff Bridges, Chris Pine and Ben Foster(n)

programme.title: The Wicker Man (1973)
programme.desc: A devoutly Christian Scottish police officer travels to a remote island to investigate the disappearance of a missing girl. As his investigations are disrupted at every turn, the detective is horrified to see the population have embraced an ancient pagan lifestyle, and begins to fear they may intend to sacrifice the child in an occult ritual. Director's cut of the horror, starring Edward Woodward, Christopher Lee and Britt Ekland(n)

programme.title: Sorcerer (1977)
programme.desc: Four men with shady pasts take a lucrative and potentially fatal delivery job driving two trucks full of dangerously unstable dynamite along equally unsound roads through the South American jungle. William Friedkin's thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Bruno Cremer, Francisco Rabal and Amidou(n)

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street (1994)
programme.desc: A woman raises her six-year-old daughter to believe that Santa Claus does not exist, but they both have a change of heart after meeting a department store Father Christmas who claims to be the man himself. When the kindly fellow is accused of being a charlatan, his new friends engage a lawyer to prove his true identity. Remake of the 1947 family drama, with Richard Attenborough, Elizabeth Perkins, Mara Wilson and Dylan McDermott(n)

programme.title: The Train (1964)
programme.desc: As the Allies look set to liberate Paris from the Nazi forces, the Germans resolve to take all they can from the city - and plot to transport national treasures back to Berlin. However, bold French Resistance forces vow to stop them, enlisting the help of a train inspector along the way. Second World War adventure, starring Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield, Jeanne Moreau and Michel Simon(n)

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of magicians-turned-criminals is reunited for a comeback performance by a ruthless technology magnate, who se actual goal is to force the team into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist on his behalf. The illusionists realise their only hope of avoiding the law is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to expose the businessman's illegal activities. Crime thriller sequel, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Daniel Radcliffe and Morgan Freeman(n)

programme.title: Dirty Grandpa (2016)
programme.desc: An uptight lawyer preparing to marry his boss's controlling daughter and secure a prestigious job is persuaded to drive his fun-loving grandfather to Florida. However, the old man is convinced his grandson is about to make a terrible mistake, and turns the road trip into a wildly hedonistic weekend in the hope of inspiring him to get more fun out of life. Comedy, starring Robert De Niro and Zac Efron(n)

programme.title: Brotherhood (2016)
programme.desc: Sam Peel is now married to lawyer Kayla, with whom he's raising two children, and is determined to stay out of trouble, but he is blackmailed into returning to the criminal underworld. Drama sequel concluding the Hood trilogy, written, directed by and starring Noel Clarke(n)

programme.title: Things to Come (2016)

programme.title: Mrs Pollifax - Spy (1971)

programme.title: The Battle at Apache Pass (1952)
programme.desc: Apache chief Cochise resolves to make a treaty allowing his people to live in peace with white settlers. However, his hot-headed fellow leader Geronimo disagrees, and puts the negotiations at risk by embarking on a murder spree, incurring the wrath of his enemies. Western, with John Lund, Jeff Chandler and Susan Cabot(n)

programme.title: Earthquake (1974)

Meanwhile, other residents, including an insubordinate cop, a lecherous shopkeeper and a daredevil motorcyclist, face their own battles for survival. Disaster movie, starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, Genevieve Bujold, Richard Roundtree and George Kennedy(n)

programme.title: The River Wild (1994)

Meanwhile, her husband desperately tries to keep track from the riverbank, waiting for his opportunity to launch a rescue attempt. Action thriller, starring Meryl Streep, Kevin Bacon, David Strathairn, Joseph Mazzello and John C Reilly(n)

programme.desc: Party-loving Lisa Townend hosts the final dinner party in north Kent, and hopes that a menu full of French fancies and innovative entertainment in the form of human roulette, will be enough to impress her guests and see her crowned winner of the £1,000 cash prize(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition gets under way at the Oak Tree Cottage in Burley, Hampshire, where owner Jacqui Castle and her sidekick Jane Waters hope the homely approach will win the day. Guests Martin and Catherine Crosswaite are not encouraged by the shared facilities, while breakfast served at a communal table is not to the liking of Norman Butcher and Lorraine Watkins(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Bath's the Rising Sun Inn, where owners Lorraine Hawkins and Norman Butcher hope to bring their guests up to standard by having a dress code. Following their feedback on the last visit, Jacqui and Jane take an extra critical eye to the rooms, while Martin and Catherine show their competitive streak during a boules match(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Busfeild Arms in East Morton for the third day of the contest, where hosts Martin and Catherine Croswaite pride themselves in giving great Yorkshire hospitality. Jacqui is overwhelmed by the luxury and extras in the rooms, which raises questions about how the owners make a profit. Meanwhile, Martin shocks the group by sharing his stunt motorbike riding past, and later, Patrick feels the pressure of being the final host(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stopover is at Patrick Duggan's Beatles-themed Epstein House in Liverpool, the former home of band manager Brian Epstein's father. Jacqui and Jane are unimpressed by unpleasant smells in the bedroom, while Martin and Catherine show they will do anything to win during a game of Fab Four charades. At dinner, Patrick shocks his guests when he reveals his idea of the ideal woman. Will it have an effect on their feedback?(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Jacqui and Jane from the Oak Tree Cottage want to find out why Norman and Lorraine wouldn't return, while Martin and Catherine from the Busfeild Arms have some explaining to do when it comes to their profit margins. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Paramedics help a drunk driver who has crashed on a dual carriageway, but find themselves on the receiving end of a vicious attack. In Bromsgrove, an ambulance comes under siege(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The trauma team at St George's Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the words-and-numbers game as team captain Jon Richardson is joined by Rhod Gilbert to take on Lee Mack and Rob Beckett. Tim Key is in Dictionary Corner with Countdown regular Susie Dent, and Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers with a little help from comedian Joe Wilkinson(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The trauma team at St George's Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Sri Lanka to reveal the extraordinary lengths to which manufacturers go in order to split red lentils, and asks why they bother with this process. Kate Quilton learns why the way tea is drunk can affect its taste, and Matt Tebbutt finds out the difference between bubblegum and chewing gum(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke recalls the impressive works of engineering people have achieved with their vehicles - from the scrap Learjet turned into a luxury garden studio to the restoration of the only surviving British mobile cinema truck. Plus, the 1950s railway carriage that was converted into a three-bedroom home and an incredibly stylish custom-designed jeep transformed into a cocktail bar(n)

programme.title: Carry On Teacher (1959)
programme.desc: A headmaster hopes to land a more prestigious job at a better school, but his pupils do not want him to leave. When two inspectors pay a visit, the mischievous students see a chance to sabotage his career plans with a series of pranks. Comedy, starring Ted Ray, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams(n)

programme.title: Jamie's Comfort Food Bites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares spaghetti vongole with a pink twist(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Meudon Hotel in Falmouth, Cornwall, where owner Gaye Woods hopes to impress rivals Tim and Mikey, Joan and Geoff, and Sue and Chris(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Malborough in Devon and The Royal Oak pub, run by laid-back owner Tim Heap, and the basic rooms are a hit for some, while others question the cleanliness(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Angel Guest House in Tiverton, Devon, where owners Chris and Sue Holliday have created a homespun experience(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Expectations are high as the guests arrive at the Compton Swan in Berkshire, after co-owner Joan McGowan revealed she was named Ireland's Businesswoman of the Year(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oil and gas co-ordinator Danielle Greenwood is keen to impress as she hosts the first dinner party in the Merseyside area, as she welcomes divorcee Jade Chantelle Short, Michael Buble impersonator Jamie Somers, pastoral care manager Steven Booth, and nursery school teacher Anna Senior into her home. Danielle takes no risks with a down-to-earth menu, which she hopes will help bag her the £1,000 prize at the end of the week(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pastoral care manager Steven Booth hosts the second Merseyside dinner party, and names each course after a Tina Turner song, hoping to win the £1,000 prize. The food is well received, but tensions rise when one guest makes a tactless comment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous PR representative Jade Chantelle hosts the third night in Merseyside, where she hopes a casino-themed evening with lashings of champagne and a high-class menu will help her to win the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Primary school teacher Anna Senior hosts the fourth night in Merseyside with a fairy tale-themed evening. Her menu consists of a Mad Hatter's soup and sandwich, a special pork dish cooked three ways and baked cheesecake for dessert, but she must try to control the tension between Jamie and Jade to have a successful party(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Michael Buble impersonator Jamie Somers hosts the final Merseyside dinner party, but may have to put aside his differences with guest Jade if he is to be crowned the winner of the £1,000 cash prize(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Brighton Surf hotel, where Jeremy and Elena Mann hope their hands-off hosting style will win the approval of their guests(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Number 16, in Greenwich, London, owned by actor and antiques dealer, Robert Gray. Alas, Jan and Les find the dusty decor off-putting(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week comes from the Fleur de Lis in Sandwich, Kent, with hosts Jan and Les Fisher convinced their traditional place will impress the others(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Dale End House near Matlock in the Peak District, where owner Sarah Summers is dreading the arrival of Robert after their confrontation(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day sees the B&B owners meet for the last time, with the Brighton Surf Hotel's Jeremy and Elena Mann wanting to defend their no-breakfast remote-hosting concept(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A mountain biker has a bad fall in a remote part of a forest, a four-year-old needs strong pain relief when he breaks his thigh bone, and a farmer fractures a replacement hip(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: A man who has collapsed by the roadside is suspected of having taken drugs, and a 15-year-old girl is treated after having a fit, only to begin having a second seizure(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. He's very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on Wiltshire's police, paramedics and fire services. Cases include a man with an axe-related injury, while another team respond to a Saturday afternoon call-out to help the victim of an injury incurred while playing rugby. And at a road traffic incident, a woman has to be cut out of her car and faces life-changing multiple injuries(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Angela Keenan and Jon Benbow-Brown have visited Menorca five times together, and have fallen in love with the laid-back way of life on the island. The pair are planning to retire there full-time, so Ben Hillman shows them five houses on the island for their budget of £165,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Kay Havard and Paul Young wish to buy a holiday home for romantic weekends away and to share with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas does her best to impress them with five properties on Spain's Costa Blanca for their budget of £80,000(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet James and Graham, who are unable to agree about their 17th-century cottage in the Surrey village of Cranleigh. They need more space and while Graham thinks the answer to their problem would be to sell, James fancies an extension. Kirstie has an economical plan to redesign the house, while Phil finds out what £650,000 gets you in Britain's most expensive county(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor, while three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salon owner Hannah hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Devon, hoping to impress her guests with a menu bursting with taste sensations(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second dinner party in Devon is hosted by funeral director and BMX fanatic Simon, who hopes his big portions and 'man food' will win him the cash prize at the end of the week(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Body artist Pascale hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Devon, preparing a Vietnamese menu full of flavour and colour in an effort to impress her guests enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, her cooking attire for the starter leaves little to the imagination, Nick and Simon find some unusual artwork in her bedroom, Hannah discovers an unwanted guest in her main course, and Nick hits a nerve with Ajay(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nick hosts the fourth night in Devon, preparing a menu that he hopes represents his personality - big, bold and brash - although after his argument with Ajay, he is planning on turning down the banter. However, salon owner Hannah is not impressed with Nick's venison main and ladybird-loving Pascale finds the portions a bit too big. But undertaker Simon is happy to polish off any leftovers - is Nick in with a chance of bagging the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Ajay hopes her nautical-themed evening will see her sail to victory on the fifth and final night in Devon. Along with a gigantic seafood spread, she has also laid on a boat trip around Torquay harbour. However, all does not go quite to plan in the galley. The guests later gather to discover who has won the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke gets to work on a 300-year-old house in Broadstairs, which was once a school and a retirement community, leaving it with a few quirky features - not least a row of three toilets. For inspiration, he visits the Royal Pavilion in Brighton. He also helps a couple make the most of the tiny living room in their 1930s south London bungalow(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras return to Chester Zoo, where Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake, and decides to escape. Meanwhile, young giraffe Narus has been battling with other young males in the herd, so the keepers think that it's time to move him to a new zoo. Which is easier said than done(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick fears the worst when a young cockapoo is hit by a lawnmower, and he faces the challenge of saving as much of its leg as possible. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old labrador struggles with pain in its elbows, and a German Shepherd-Collie cross is suffering with a bulging disk in his spin and hip dysplasia(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Tim and Zoe Bawtree, who live in a costly Regency property in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, plan to build a modern, low-maintenance house in their back garden. However, height restrictions mean 60 per cent of their new home has to be underground and there are 90 objections from neighbours to their planning application. Undeterred, the pair press ahead, only to encounter further problems - including the departure of the builders(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As Dick and Angel prepare for winter, they attend a food festival in Rouen, where they hope to find inspiration over what to do with their fresh fruit and vegetables. Angel adds the finishing touches to the floating geodesic dome in time for a family sleepover, while Dick gets to work fixing the crumbling stucco(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the last series, Howard Evans and Prue Chiles helped reworked midwife Mandy's 1980s house, transforming the ugly exterior and first-floor living area. Now George revisits Nottingham's Park Estate to find out if Mandy has managed to complete the transformation and make the ground floor equally as spectacular(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Railway
programme.desc: A ride along the West Highland line with train conductor Suzie Sangan, and a look behind the scenes at the new restaurant at Aviemore station(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patient's wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to A&E by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get John's pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The Mercedes SLR, with Jeremy Clarkson in the driving seat, races a boat with Richard Hammond and James May from London to Oslo. Meanwhile, the team discovers how many times a car can roll at high speed, the campaign to find the best driving song ever continues and broadcaster David Dimbleby takes to the track as the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team takes a look at off-road models and test-drives the Bentley Flying Spur. There is also an attempt to drive a Jeep across a lake, a comparison of petrol and diesel-fuelled BMW 5 series vehicles, and Davina McCall is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle learns how much Frank's coin-operated children's motorbike ride is worth while the guys are trawling through barns in search of treasure(n)

programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz go all Scooby Doo on Halloween as they pick an abandoned theme park and a ghoulish former prison(n)

programme.desc: Pro driver Shane Lynch allows engineer Ralph Hosier and his teams four days in the scrapyard to build two vehicles that then go against Shane's Audi R8 V10 in a duel test of acceleration and braking(n)

programme.desc: The team takes a look at off-road models and test-drives the Bentley Flying Spur. There is also an attempt to drive a Jeep across a lake, a comparison of petrol and diesel-fuelled BMW 5 series vehicles, and Davina McCall is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians explore the life of the South Devon branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years' experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotland's most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. She also discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to the south-west corner of Wales and one of Britain's finest coastal paths to find out why Pembrokeshire feels so English, even though it's more than 100 miles from the border. With its numerous castles and a fine cathedral, there are sure signs the Normans stamped their mark over the area. Tony's four-day walk traces the story of their conquest of the county, which he discovers was very different from the knockout victory at Hastings, involving a long, fiercely fought struggle(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to Guernsey and Jersey to tell the story of the islands' surrender to the Nazis during the Second World War. In Guernsey, he hears of the first bombing raid that heralded the German troops' arrival and sees the spot where the first-ever British commando landed in secret, only to see the planned revenge raid fail spectacularly. A ferry then takes him on to Jersey, where he finds almost all of its beaches have a bunker or a machine gun post left over from the conflict(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: As the 800th anniversary of the signing of Magna Carta in June 1215 approaches, Tony Robinson sets out to discover the real King John. His walk across the medieval monarch's stamping grounds of Sherwood Forest and the Peak District reveals a hapless man stumbling from crisis to crisis who, in the end, had no choice but to sign away some of his power. In the midst of what are now cultivated fields, Tony finds the scant remains of Laxton Castle, once the control centre where strict 'forest law' was administered and where taxes and fines flooded into the royal coffers. Later, in Sherwood, he explores how the myth of Robin Hood has helped to skew the public's image of King John(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes up from Lyme Regis on Dorset's Jurassic Coast to the Somerset Levels in the footsteps of a ragtag rebel army led by the young Duke of Monmouth, the illegitimate son of Charles II. He sailed in from Holland around Lyme's famous Cobb with a handful of soldiers, believing the people would support him in overthrowing the newly crowned James II, who was also Monmouth's uncle, but, more importantly, Roman Catholic. The year was 1685 and the country was riven by anti-Catholic feeling mixed up with revolutionary zeal. Monmouth marched through the fiercely independent towns of Devon, gathering support from artisans and farmworkers. Meeting up with Billy Bragg in Colyton, Tony learns about the kind of people prepared to risk their lives for the Monmouth Rebellion(n)

programme.title: Duran Duran: There's Something You Should Know
programme.desc: Forty years since the formation of the band who went on to become one of the biggest acts of the 1980s, Simon Le Bon, John Taylor, Nick Rhodes and Roger Taylor open up about the highs and lows of their career - with archive footage of former guitarist Andy Taylor helping round out the story. The documentary charts their trajectory through seven of their 14 albums, each one uncovering a compelling chapter in the history of five lads from Birmingham who had one simple dream - to become the biggest band in the world. Contributors include Boy George, Nile Rodgers and Mark Ronson. First of two programmes celebrating Duran Duran's 40-year anniversary(n)

programme.title: The Rolling Stones at the BBC
programme.desc: A selection of the band's performances from the BBC archives, in a programme originally broadcast in 2012 to celebrate their 50th anniversary. Songs include The Last Time, Let's Spend The Night Together, Get Off of My Cloud, Honky Tonk Women, Gimme Shelter, Miss You and Start Me Up. Plus, footage of the band performing 19th Nervous Breakdown on Top of the Pops in 1966, which was used in a 1960s BBC documentary about women with depression(n)

However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris(n)

programme.desc: A country singer arranges for his wife and his underage lover to both die in a phoney plane crash after his spouse diverts all his money to her religious causes in revenge for his affair. He is confident he remains above suspicion, but Columbo realises something does not add up and sets out to wrest a confession from the musician. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Johnny Cash and Ida Lupino(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Troubled Waters (1975)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth sets out on a pleasure cruise to Acapulco. However, one of the passengers is planning to kill his lover to stop her blackmailing him, and has arranged a cast-iron alibi. But when the crime is discovered, the captain looks to Columbo to solve the mystery. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Vaughn, Dean Stockwell, Patrick Macnee and Poupee Bocar(n)

Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Faye Dunaway(n)

programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate when an undercover secret service agent is found murdered in her home. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong(n)

programme.title: Fit to Rule: How Royal Illness Changed History
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley explores the medical histories of Britain's monarchs from the later Stuarts to the birth of the Hanoverian dynasty. She examines the infertility of William III and the extraordinary lengths parliament employed to find a Protestant successor when Queen Anne died without a surviving heir. The Hanoverians had no difficulties carrying on their line, but were beset by other problems. Lucy explores the reasons behind the so-called madness of George III, and looks at George IV's battle with obesity, alcohol and drugs(n)

programme.title: Very Important Person (1961)
programme.desc: A pompous Allied scientist ends up in a PoW camp after crash-landing during a reconnaissance mission over Germany. His uncompromising attitude and a series of misunderstandings initially earn him the enmity of his fellow inmates, but his popularity improves when he devises an audacious escape plan. Second World War comedy, with James Robertson Justice, Stanley Baxter, Leslie Phillips and Eric Sykes(n)

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The work of London's Marine Support Unit, who pre-empt and counter criminal activities on and around the Thames. The film follows the team as they investigate a suspicious incident on the riverbank, discover a body in a canal and uncover a weighted down bag with some sinister contents. Plus, they go about their everyday business protecting the public from the dangers of the water. Postponed from March 13(n)

programme.title: Looking for Victoria
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part docu-drama. Historical experts discuss Queen Victoria's reign, intercut with Prunella Scales playing the monarch at various key moments of her life, revealing the true personality behind the granite-faced exterior. Prince Albert's death deeply affects the Queen, but she finds comfort in her subsequent friendship with Scottish servant John Brown. With Timothy West and Charles Dance(n)

programme.title: War and Peace (1956)
programme.desc: Three Russian aristocrats - flighty Natasha, pacifist Pierre and military officer Andrei - endure a series of tumultuous events as Naopleon Bonaparte's armies invade their country. While Andrei is sent to the front line, Pierre is drawn into a loveless marriage, ignorant of Natasha's feelings for him. Historical drama based on Leo Tolstoy's novel, starring Audrey Hepburn, Henry Fonda and John Mills(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Dr Giles Yeo investigates the latest diet craze - 'clean eating', the social media sensation that suggests certain foods we eat can actually cleanse our bodies and make us healthier. programme.title: Britain's Biggest Primary School
programme.desc: This edition follows some of the girls at Gascoigne Primary School in Barking, east London, as they navigate their way through the ups and down of relationships. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
